ASR Outdoor 4pk Aircraft Grade Aluminum Screw In Tent Stakes Pegs Ground

Holding power, durability, terrain diversity, as well as easy installation and packability, these lightweight but durable 6061 aircraft grade aluminum tent stakes from ASR Outdoor boast it all.

These camping essentials tent stakes come with sharp pointed tips, hooked heads, rust proof aluminum unibody construction with twisted metal design for easy and quick installation. Featuring a lightweight but heavy duty design, these tent stakes feature a single body, 6061 aircraft grade aluminum construction, increasing ground anchor integrity, durability and longevity, as well as making installation and removal efficient. The intention twisted metal body design means no hand tools or hammers are needed, as the tent stakes will screw right into the ground, enhancing stability and grip.

Key Features

  • CAMPING ESSENTIALS: ASR Outdoor aircraft grade 6061 aluminum tent feature unibody construction, making them a reliable choice to ensure camping tents are firmly secured; the pegs feature sharp tips, hooked heads and twisted drill rust proof design for quick installation, no hand tools needed
  • UNIBODY CONSTRUCTION: Lightweight but heavy duty, these aluminum tent stakes are made from tough 6061 aircraft grade aluminum, increasing the ground anchors integrity, durability and longevity; the twisted metal body design means no hammers are needed and are ready to screw right into the ground
  • MULTIPURPOSE GROUND ANCHOR: Whether setting up a camping tent, overhead canopy, for landscaping, tarp tie downs or for sporting events or other, these rust proof aircraft grade aluminum tent stakes can handle it all; suitable for use in grass, dirt, gravel and sand terrains
  • GREAT FOR TRAVEL: Purposeful lightweight design and material construction make these tent pegs, tent stakes or ground anchors ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, mountaineering and more, as their design won’t weigh you or your gear down
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Weight: 0.22lbs; Color: Silver

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 3Z1R218X
  • UPC: 810131708665
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 4pk

The purposeful lightweight design and material construction make these tent pegs ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, mountaineering and more, as they won’t weigh your gear down in comparison to other heavier tent stakes.

Reliable and robust, these aluminum tent stakes can handle everything from multi person camping tents, tarp tie downs, landscaping projects, overhead installations for sporting events and much more; they’re suitable for use in dirt, sand, gravel and grassy terrains, giving you a diverse selection of ground anchoring possibilities.

Reach for these lightweight and incredibly sturdy tent stakes from ASR Outdoor come your next camping trip or backcountry adventure!

Dimensions: 9 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches

4pk Tent Stakes Weight: 0.22lbs
